title: ephedra foliata var. ciliata
intro: Ephedra foliata var. ciliata, also known as Mormon tea or Ephedra ciliata, is a plant species within the Ephedraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and diuretic effects, which help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include improved circulation, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. In terms of herbal preparations, Ephedra foliata var. ciliata can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or extract, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
